title: Demolition activity
summary:
Main
By Yiannis Parganas
Demolition activity across all sectors has been notably subdued thus far this year. Shipyards are grappling with weak demand for steel and suppressed prices, which limit the feasibility of offering higher scrap rates. Additionally, the appreciation of the US dollar and constrained liquidity further hinder their competitiveness amid the prevailing freight market dynamics.
